title: Fans Speculate GTA 6 Trailer 3 Could Drop on August 7
summary: Players believe the third trailer for the game may arrive on August 7, 2026, based on Take-Two Interactive scheduling its quarterly earnings call unusually early that morning instead of after market close. Speculation suggests the company wants to capitalize on announcement momentum, possibly revealing gameplay footage for the first time.

title: Rockstar Website Update Fuels Trailer 3 Speculation
summary: Rockstar Games has started updating its website after removing the pre-order banner, which historically signals new announcements are coming. Fans are anticipating the mythical third trailer could finally be revealed, though no official date has been confirmed by the developer.

title: Take-Two Earnings Call Set for August 7 Amid Trailer Expectations
summary: Take-Two Interactive will report its first quarter fiscal 2027 earnings on August 7, marking the first financial update covering the GTA 6 pre-order window. The unusual morning timing has sparked speculation about major marketing announcements coinciding with the call.

title: Rockstar Developers Move to Unionize Amid Potential Strike Threat
summary: Developers at multiple Rockstar UK studios are forming a union to address crunch conditions, pay transparency, and flexible working as the game enters its final development phase. A potential strike during the critical pre-launch period could impact the November 19 release date or lead to a buggy launch.

title: No Physical Disc Version Confirmed Despite Customer Support Email Confusion
summary: The Hollywood Reporter confirmed that GTA 6 will not receive a physical disc at launch or months afterward, with only code-in-box versions available at retail. A confusing Rockstar customer support email led to brief speculation about discs arriving post-launch, but this was clarified as referring to the download code boxes.
